dialogos.texto_en: (The graduation trip is on its fourth day today...\n Only two days left for the quintuplets game.)
(Yesterday, they gave me a hard time,\n but I've pretty much figured out their tricks.)
(...Just watch.\n I'll definitely see through their game\n today and tomorrow!)
Good morning.\nIt's another nice day today.
You seemed pretty tired yesterday.\nDid you sleep well?
(Hmph...\n I was caught off guard yesterday,\n but I won't be surprised anymore!)
No worries. I rested well in preparation for today.
That's reassuring.\nToday's sightseeing will be enjoyable, won't it?
Now then, what should we do for breakfast?\nShould we have it at the hotel\nor go to Ocean Expo Park first?
(Already getting started, huh?\n This seems like something Yotsuba would suggest,\n but it's probably a setup.)
(Don't panic, and judge calmly\n in the face of their tricks.)
Um, which do you prefer, Uesugi-kun?
I don't mind either.\nI'll go along with whatever you guys want.
Okay. It's better to eat first...\nbefore we get hungry on the way.
I should have checked for breakfast menus\nor confirmed it last night.
(Cool, I'm doing well.\n Today, I'll definitely get myself\n a clue of who's who!)
